response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed for musical segments. The title card "hololive GAMERS FES. CHOCHOCHOGOCHOGAMERS 2" was identified at the start. Using audio/visual analysis, two distinct songs were identified: "Say! Fanfare!" by Shirakami Fubuki and "Mogu Mogu YUMMY!" by Nekomata Okayu. Web searches for these songs confirmed their titles, performers, and provided lyrics in both Japanese and English. The remainder of the video was identified as transitional segments without clear distinct song lyrics.
response.global_summary: A 5-minute video compilation titled "hololive GAMERS FES. CHOCHOCHOGOCHOGAMERS 2", featuring various musical performances and segments from the hololive GAMERS group (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone). The video includes both full song performances and short highlights of their musical content.

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki performs her song "Say! Fanfare!". Title and artist details are implied by the event branding.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: Say (Yeah), Say (Yeah), Say (Yeah) ほら その かお あげて みんなで てをとれば (ふわ、ふわ、ふわ、ふわ) Dive (phew) まだ 途中だよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Say (Yeah), come on, lift up your face If we all join hands (Fluffy, fluffy) Dive (Foo), we're still on the way Let's go beyond the world (Ready, set!)

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu performs her song "Mogu Mogu YUMMY!". Title is implied based on the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 森羅万象の悪戦苦闘も マヨネーズかけたら 大体美味しくなる? 君が泣いても お腹は空くよ 消化できなかった 「ごめんごめん。」
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Even the hardest thing in all the world If you put mayonnaise on it Will taste good? Even if you cry, you’ll still get hungry Couldn’t digest it, sorry sorry.

scenes.description: A transitional segment featuring dialogue or instrumental music related to the "CHOCHOCHOGOCHOGAMERS 2" event.
